source_index_issue.summary: The primary Markdown and the alternate MinerU run both open as the 2008 U.S. small quarterly projection model paper. The local implementation cross-check identifies GPM6_IMF13 as a 2013 six-region Global Projection Model.

implementation_cross_check.summary: Identifies GPM6_IMF13 as GPM6 with regions EA6, EU, JA, LA6, RC6, and US; confirms six-region variable coverage but is not treated as paper-side formula provenance.
